name: Aimoo Link
description: OpenClaw Aimoo Link channel plugin with embedded Agent Link Core.

aimoo.label: Aimoo Link
aimoo.description: A2A Hub Agent Link over MQTT.

enabled.description: Enable or disable the Aimoo Link channel.

agentId.description: Local OpenClaw agent id, for example ava or mia.

connectUrl.description: Public Agent Link URL exposed by A2A Hub. Recommended value is /agent-link/connect.

connectUrlFile.description: Optional local file containing connectUrl. Mainly kept for compatibility or local development.

userProfileFile.description: Optional OpenClaw USER.md path used for public self-registration owner profile.

stateFile.description: Optional path for writing runtime state JSON.

replyMode.description: Reply generation mode. Defaults to openclaw-agent; handler remains available for custom local processors.

openClawCommand.description: OpenClaw CLI command used when replyMode=openclaw-agent.

openClawTimeoutSec.description: Timeout in seconds for a single OpenClaw agent turn.

httpTimeoutMs.description: HTTP bootstrap, presence, and message request timeout in milliseconds.

bootstrapRetryIntervalSec.description: Maximum retry interval in seconds after bootstrap or self-registration fails.

tlsRejectUnauthorized.description: Whether HTTPS requests must validate the remote TLS certificate.

recordOpenClawSession.description: Whether task dispatch and replies should also be written into local OpenClaw sessions.

writeWorkspaceTools.description: Write A2A Hub helper instructions into workspace TOOLS.md. Defaults to false; helper and runbook are always written under .agent-link regardless.

handlerCommand.description: Optional local command used when replyMode=handler.

metadata.description: Extra metadata sent with presence heartbeats.

instances.description: Optional multi-agent configuration. Each item starts one Agent Link runtime inside the same OpenClaw gateway.
